{{CargoRelic
|name=Jilin-1 Meteorite
|class_id=22412
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAME
|birthday=05-07
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.03%)
|description=On May 7, 1976 AD, a meteor shower occurred in the Jilin region.<br>Jilin-1 is the largest stone meteorite in the world, weighing up to 1,770 kilograms. It is estimated that its parent body was a planet from the asteroid belt that formed about 4.6 billion years ago. About 8 million years ago, a celestial body collided with the parent body of the Jilin-1 meteorite, causing it to become a meteor shower and eventually fall to Earth.
|fame=44
|art=23
|fth=23
|civ=28
|tech=36
|ss1=Like The Great Collector, obtained B-Tadpoles +5%
|ss2=Like The Great Collector, obtained B-Tadpoles +10%
|ss3=Like The Great Collector, obtained B-Tadpoles +15%
|ss4=Like The Great Collector, obtained B-Tadpoles +25%
|ss7=Like The Great Collector, obtained B-Tadpoles +25%<br>Like The Great Collector, obtained B-Tadpoles +25% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Forestsanctum skill I.png|50px]]Place in Forest Sanctum: Forest Sanctum, Glorium Output +5%
}}
